en_title: Ex-PlayStation Boss Defends PC Strategy as Sony Pivots Away from Multiplatform Releases
cn_title: 前PlayStation高管为PC战略辩护，索尼却放弃单机PC移植
subtitle: 并非为了赚钱
opus_summary: 前索尼互动娱乐美国CEO Shawn Layden辩护称，PlayStation把游戏搬上PC是为扩大IP受众、铺垫影视改编，而非赚钱。

paragraphs.en: Shawn Layden, the former President and CEO of Sony Interactive Entertainment of America, has explained why PlayStation's PC strategy made sense.
paragraphs.cn: 前索尼互动娱乐美国分公司总裁兼CEO肖恩·莱登(Shawn Layden)解释了PlayStation的PC策略为何有其道理。

paragraphs.en: When speaking with the YouTube channel PSI , Layden was asked about the value of exclusives. The former executive explained that it makes sense to have games that you can only get on PlayStation, but it also makes sense to make them available to other audiences later. Layden noted that the expansion into PC was not to make money, but to grow their IPs beyond those that are already embedded in the PlayStation ecosystem.
paragraphs.cn: 在接受YouTube频道PSI采访时，莱登被问及独占游戏的价值。这位前高管解释道，拥有只能在PlayStation上游玩的游戏有其道理，但之后将它们带给其他平台的玩家同样合理。莱登指出，向PC拓展并非为了赚钱，而是想将IP的受众群拓展到那些已经扎根于PlayStation生态的用户之外。

paragraphs.en: Particularly, that importance grew when PlayStation began making plans to adapt its IPs into films and TV shows, as it meant that they needed to expand their reach.
paragraphs.cn: 当PlayStation开始计划将IP改编成电影和电视剧时，这种重要性尤为凸显，因为这意味着他们需要扩大覆盖范围。

paragraphs.en: "The PC thing, in my mind at the time, was not to make money, frankly," said Layden. "It was, 'How do I get my intellectual property in front of people who wouldn't normally see it? How do I get the world of Horizon to be seen by people who aren't in the PlayStation world?' Not necessarily because they're going to buy a PlayStation, I wasn't that crazy. But as we take our [IP] across other media, whether it's into film, television, comic books, or whatever... you need to have as many eyeballs that are aware of this character [and] this story.
paragraphs.cn: 莱登说：「说实话，我当时觉得PC这件事不是为了赚钱。」「而是想，'我怎么才能让我的知识产权呈现在那些平时不会接触到的人面前？怎么让《地平线》的世界被PlayStation圈外的人看到？'不一定是因为他们会买一台PlayStation，我还没那么天真。但随着我们把[IP]推向其他媒体，无论是电影、电视、漫画还是别的什么……你需要尽可能多的眼睛来认识这个角色[和]这个故事。」

paragraphs.en: "Just concentrating on the PlayStation population and only telling them these stories, and then try to bring it off that platform into other media, that's going to be a hell of a jump."
paragraphs.cn: 「如果只盯着PlayStation用户群，只给他们讲这些故事，然后试图把内容从那个平台带到其他媒体上，那将是一个巨大的跳跃。」

paragraphs.en: Layden went on to note that those who were buying these games on PC likely weren't going to buy a PS5 regardless, as the time between the console version and the PC port meant that anyone who really wanted the game would've bought a console for it.
paragraphs.cn: 莱登接着指出，那些在PC上购买这些游戏的玩家，本来也不太可能去买一台PS5，因为主机版与PC版之间的时间差意味着，真正渴望玩到这些游戏的人早就为此买了主机。

paragraphs.en: "If someone's waiting 18 months for something to come on PC, we didn't lose a sale to them. They weren't going to buy the hardware anyway." Layden said.
paragraphs.cn: 「如果有人愿意等上18个月就为了某个游戏出PC版，我们并没有损失这单销售。他们本来也不会买硬件。」Layden说道。

paragraphs.en: The news comes following reports that PlayStation is abandoning PC as a platform for its narrative-driven single-player games. That means Marvel's Wolverine, Intergalactic, and God of War Laufey will not come to PC in the future. Instead, the company plans to use the platform for live-service titles, and that's about it. There's no case-by-case play here.
paragraphs.cn: 这一消息是在有报道称PlayStation正放弃将PC作为其叙事驱动单机游戏平台之后传出的。这意味着《漫威金刚狼》、《Intergalactic》和《战神：劳菲》未来不会登陆PC。相反，公司计划将PC仅用于服务型游戏，仅此而已。这里没有逐案决定的空间。

paragraphs.en: PlayStation reportedly felt that the PC versions of its games were inconsistent and weren't driving enough revenue, making them somewhat redundant for the brand going forward. Although the PC releases weren't topping any sales charts, they were indeed reaching people that otherwise may not have played these games, like Layden said. However, in a time where companies are looking to cut costs wherever they can, it may not have been an expense that PlayStation could continue to spare.
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，PlayStation认为其游戏的PC版本表现参差不齐，且收入贡献不足，这使得它们对品牌未来有些多余。尽管PC版并未登上任何销售榜单，但确实触及了那些原本可能不会玩到这些游戏的玩家，正如Layden所说。然而，在各大公司都在想方设法削减成本之际，这或许已不再是PlayStation能够继续承担的额外开支。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，主要报道游戏、电影等娱乐内容。你可以在X上@Cade_Onder找到他。
